transcript:
CALLER: Hi. I want to add my newborn to my health policy and also check if delivery charges at your clinic can be claimed.
AGENT: Congratulations on your newborn! Adding a newborn to your policy is done through your insurer directly — most allow it within 90 days of birth. Please contact your insurance company for that process.
CALLER: Okay. And the delivery charges? I delivered here last week.
AGENT: For delivery charges, if your policy covers maternity, you'll need the original bills, discharge summary, and your health card to file a reimbursement claim. Our billing team can provide all necessary documents.
CALLER: Can I pick up the documents today?
AGENT: Yes, please visit our billing counter with your patient ID. Documents like discharge summary and itemised bill can be provided on the same day.
CALLER: Perfect. Thank you and I'll come by today.
